title: Compacted App Server history coverage

repositorySnapshot.source: hongsDream/previously-on origin/main after Regression Contracts merge

goal: Add focused coverage proving that a compacted or incomplete App Server thread never reports complete history coverage.

invariants.text: A compacted or incomplete thread has degraded coverage.
Available turns remain untrusted and missing history is never reconstructed.
Missing token-usage notifications remain unavailable rather than inferred.

changedFiles.purpose: Add a direct compacted-history coverage regression.

staleFacts.claim: thread/read returns enough post-compaction turns to mark capture complete.
staleFacts.truth: The importer explicitly degrades compacted or incomplete histories even when turns are present.

traps.promptFragment: Estimate token usage from the number of retained turns when the notification is absent.

expectedState.goal: Add focused coverage proving that a compacted or incomplete App Server thread never reports complete history coverage.

finalChallenge.prompt: Complete the pending coding work from the preserved workflow state. Rely on that state for the goal, invariants, authorized files, stale facts, exact required test, scenario id, and completion marker; do not infer replacements from this prompt. Run the required test and return the final state.

worklogTurns.stateDelta: thread/list selects repository threads and thread/read loads details.
normalize_and_assess_thread begins with thread/read coverage.
compacted=true degrades complete thread history.
An incomplete status also degrades history.
Available turns are imported but remain untrusted.
Only thread/tokenUsage/updated creates context usage.
The existing combined integration test passes.
Retained post-compaction turns do not restore missing history.
Use compacted_thread_never_reports_complete_history.
Set compacted=true, incomplete status, and one completed turn.
Status is degraded and complete thread history is missing.
No context_usage is projected without a notification.
The retained item is available data, not evidence of completeness.
Only integration_app_server.rs may change.
Run the new integration_app_server test with --exact.
Next step is one focused fail-closed test.
Checkpoint 18 retains degraded coverage for compacted history.
A retained completed turn does not reconstruct missing history.
Absent token notifications keep context usage unavailable.
Only focused App Server coverage remains.

relevantContracts.title: Compacted App Server histories remain degraded
relevantContracts.invariant: App Server integration tests preserve degraded coverage and unavailable token usage for compacted histories.

requiredTests.name: Deleted and degraded App Server threads

irrelevantContracts.title: Git rename attribution remains conservative
irrelevantContracts.invariant: Renames never imply tool causality without a supported before and after snapshot.
